join.title: Join a party
join.errorBadCode: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.

lobby.title: Party
lobby.waitingHostPick: Waiting for the host to pick a game…
lobby.kicked: You were removed from the party.
lobby.errorStart: Couldn't start the game. Please try again.

game.title: Football Grid
game.notMatch: That player doesn't fit, so your turn passes.
game.searchHint: Start typing to search a footballer

legend.title: How the grid works
legend.intro: Name a footballer who matches both the row and the column of a cell. Here's what each icon means.
legend.countryDesc: Has played for this national team.
legend.trophyDesc: Has won this competition, like the Champions League, a league title or a domestic cup.
legend.internationalDesc: Has won a World Cup or a European Championship.
legend.goldenBootDesc: Has won a Golden Boot as top scorer.
legend.playedWithDesc: Has been a teammate of this player.
legend.topLeaguesDesc: Has played in several of the top five European leagues.
legend.positionDesc: Plays this position: keeper, defender, midfielder or forward.
legend.currentStarDesc: Is one of the current standout players.
legend.notableDesc: A notable player or award winner.

bug.title: Report a bug
bug.desc: Tell us what went wrong, and what you were doing.
bug.error: Couldn't send your report. Please try again.

update.title: Update Miflo
update.body: You're on an older version of Miflo. Update to the latest version to keep playing with your friends.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hapticsDesc: Vibrations on taps and key moments.

stats.title: Stats
stats.comingSoonDesc: Your wins, streaks and favourite players will show up here.

aboutPage.title: About Miflo
aboutPage.blurb: Miflo is social party games for friends in the same room. Gather everyone, pick a game and play together.

howToPlay.title: How to play
howToPlay.intro: Miflo is played together in the same room. One phone starts a party and everyone else joins with the code.
howToPlay.step1Desc: Tap Create a party to get a code, or Join a party and type a friend's code.
howToPlay.step2Desc: The host picks a game once at least two players have joined.
howToPlay.step3Desc: On your turn, name a footballer who matches both the row and the column of a cell. Get three in a row to win.
howToPlay.step4Desc: Stuck? Skip your turn, or propose a tie. Everyone has to agree to end the game in a draw.
